title: Service and repair light vehicle lift assisted suspension systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Service and repair light vehicle lift assisted suspension systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to service and repair lift assisted suspension system

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Service and repair information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Service and repair information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Service and repair information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to service and repair lift assisted suspension system

elements.title: Inspect and service lift assisted suspension system

pcs.text: System is inspected according to workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Inspection results are compared with manufacturer specifications to identify service and repair requirements2.3 Inspection findings are reported according to workplace procedures2.4 Service and adjustments are carried out according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.5 Post-service testing is carried out according to workplace procedures

elements.title: Repair lift assisted suspension system

pcs.text: Repair information is sourced and interpreted3.2 Repair options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected3.3 Repair tools, equipment and materials are selected and prepared 3.4 System is repaired according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.5 Post-repair testing is carried out according to workplace procedures

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
